name: CHINA PHARMA HOLDINGS, INC.
summary: China Pharma Holdings, Inc. is a Nevada holding company operating through its wholly owned subsidiary Hainan Helpson Medical and Biotechnology Co., Ltd. (Helpson) in China. Helpson develops, manufactures, and markets pharmaceutical products including dry powder injectables, liquid injectables, tablets, capsules, and cephalosporin oral solutions. As of December 31, 2025, the company holds rights to manufacture 19 pharmaceutical products across basic generic drugs, first-to-market generic drugs, and Modern Traditional Chinese Medicines (TCMs), sold primarily on a prescription basis in the PRC.
